title: Silkiest Touch
description: This is a simple datapack that allows chorus plants, suspicious sand and gravel, budding amethyst, both types of spawners, and a dirt path to be dropped with silk touch.
body: This is a datapack that makes so most unobtainable blocks are now obtainable with silk touch. this includes reinforced deepslate, spawners, trial spawners, dirt paths, chorus plants, suspicious sand and gravel, budding amethyst, and trial vaults. There is no way of obtaining spawn eggs in this datapack so both of the spawner types are purely decorative.
